MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANTHONY D. GILES, Esq. of Law Office of Anthony Giles (Tel: 415-839-2099) for plaintiff Daniel Akhromtsev;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DANIEL AKHROMTSEV'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Daniel Akhromtsev's motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied without prejudice. The motion is not ripe because although Defendant Alexander Pavlovsky may have served an answer to Plaintiff's complaint, he still has not filed it with the Court. (See Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 438(f)(1) [motion for judgment on the pleadings made be made, if the moving party is a plaintiff, only if "the defendant has already filed his or her answer to the complaint"]; Sec. 438(c)(1)(A) [a plaintiff may move for judgment on the pleadings when "the complaint states facts sufficient to constitute a cause or causes of action against the defendant and the answer does not state facts sufficient to constitute a defense to the complaint."].) Defendant should promptly file an answer. (See September 16, 2021 Order Continuing Case Management Conference ["This case is set for a case management conference on Nov-10-2021 in Department 610 at 10:30 am to obtain an answer(s) from, or enter default(s) against, defendant(s) ALEXANDER PAVOLVSKY."].)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Defendants Motion To Strike And Notice Of Hearing Thereon
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS AURELIYA KAZAKU, CENTRAL CAPITAL GROUP, INC., FOUR LA MESA, LLC, and ALEXANDER PAVOLVSKY's Motion To Strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Code of Civil Procedure section 435.5, which requires the parties to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike may be filed. The parties are ordered immediately to meet and confer. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by September 7, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
